textByHash.cd8512273ae12552c88e58ac7a076d2f6ddcf29f: I collect valuable resources and pawn off access to them to foolish adventurers, like yourself.
textByHash.694485efc1bd006b03a5ceb7cfa52d042abba188: You should take a look inside my arena. There's an abundance of valuable resources inside.
textByHash.c7f379cc7207daa1224762811f0f6a6f1a0bf0ec: It's all yours. All I ask is you pay the upfront fee.
textByHash.c3ba6921d4da8ad3d07956c86649d75610f7d348: Yes. These walls will only hold them back for so long.
textByHash.f46338db4fe24c3228ec38136b326e5a4e247380: [laugh]! For the right price, I won't deny any one access to my arena. Even if their intention is to kill you.
textByHash.cdcbd7ca53de1c5197c5b5ae3fcdc6522df3657f: My arena holds many treasures that I've acquired at great expense, adventurer. Their bounty can come at a price.
textByHash.ea123402932b0e1006b798e9f93614d597599d76: One day, adventurer, I will boast ownership of a much larger, much more dangerous arena than this. Take advantage of this offer while it lasts.
textByHash.b96217e59d82230d25ebf613d7d015d01bd77452: That doesn't look solved to me.
